chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1740 of 2013 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of matter For orders on CMA No.6361/2023 (152 CPC) 25.10.2023 Mr. Mehfooz Ahmed Awan, Advocate for petitioner/applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, learned Assistant Advocate General Sindh, who is present in Court in some other matters, waives notice of the listed application and has recorded his no objection. By consent, this application is allowed. Consequently, instead of 3rd Senior Civil Judge, Sukkur, 2nd Senior Civil Judge, Sukkur, as reflected in the notification dated 3rd August 2021 issued by Law, Parliamentary Affairs & Criminal Prosecution Department, Government of Sindh, shall be read in the order dated 28.09.2023 for the purpose it was passed. Application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
